title: [codereview-pass1] CCP-16 intro: missing reference to SCHC compression impact on beacon size for multi-root
description: The new CCP-16 intro should reference how SCHC Rule for beacon (0x20) affects multi-root signature verification latency. P2. Link to draft-lichen-schnorr. Discovered-from current edit.
close_reason: All task items addressed in small chunks (header/TOC, parameterization+appendix rationale in §6+7 of appendix, stronger independent MUST in §5, SCHC/Schnorr/CCP-16 ref in §2, SFN boundary pseudocode+example, RFC2119 justifications/cross-refs throughout). 3+ codereview passes (including ouxz,s2yi etc.) now show only P3/P4 or opinion. All P0-P2 fixed and closed. File updated consistently with test vectors, no dead code, follows spec style. Clean.
